Frequently Asked Questions
1. When did the RPSC School Lecturer Special Online Form 2026 start?
The online application process for Rajasthan School Lecturer Special Recruitment 2026 started on 01 June 2026 .
2. What is the last date to apply online for RPSC School Lecturer Special Recruitment 2026?
The last date to submit the online application form is 30 June 2026 .
3. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 30 June 2026 .
4. When will the Rajasthan RPSC School Lecturer Special be conducted?
The Rajasthan RPSC School Lecturer Special Examination 2026 is scheduled to be conducted on 06 December 2026 .
5. What is the Selection Procedure of the RPSC School Lecturer Special Examination?
Candidates are advised to read the official notification for detailed information regarding the selection procedure, examination scheme, Syllabus, and other recruitment-related guidelines.
6. How can I apply for RPSC School Lecturer Special Recruitment 2026?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result® .
tables: Rajasthan RPSC School Lecturer PGT Special Teacher Recruitment 2026 New Exam Date

Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released the School Lecturer (Special) PGT Teacher 2026 Recruitment 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Recruitment Can Apply Online From 01/06/2026 to 30/06/2026 .candidates should read the RPSC School Lecturer Special 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

RPSC School Lecturer Special Education Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 21 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per RPSC School Lecturer Special Education Recruitment 2025.

Rajasthan School Lecturer Special Education Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 121 Post Post Name Total Post RPSC School Lecturer Special Eligibility SCHOOL LECTURER (SPECIAL EDUCATION) – 2026 121 Master Degree with Hindi/English/History/Political Science/Sociology/Music Passed from Any Recognized University in India. B.ED. (Special Education) or B.ED. with two years Diploma in Special Education Recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI).
